headline: Jim Cramer Says Wait Before Buying the Dip on Vertiv: “You’ll Get A Better Price.”
summary: Vertiv stock is bleeding out after a parabolic run, and Jim Cramer has a precise read on who is doing the selling and when they will stop. His answer may change how you think about buying this dip.

raw.headline: Jim Cramer Says Wait Before Buying the Dip on Vertiv: “You’ll Get A Better Price.”

headline: 2 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks with Competitive Advantages and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Microchip Technology, Lowers Price Target to $88
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Joe Quatrochi   maintains Microchip Technology (NASDAQ:MCHP) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $95 to $88.
